contents.value:
```prisma
model ModelName { ... }
```
Defines a data model that maps to a database table or collection. Contains field definitions, attributes, and relations.

```prisma
enum EnumName { VALUE1 VALUE2 }
```
Defines an enum type with a fixed set of allowed values.

```prisma
datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}
```
Configures the database connection including provider type and connection URL.

```prisma
type Address {
  street String
  city   String
}
```
Defines a composite type for embedded documents (MongoDB only).

```prisma
view UserView {
  id    Int    @id
  email String
}
```
Declares a database view (preview feature). Must correspond to an existing database view.

```prisma
name String
```
Variable-length text scalar type. Maps to `TEXT`, `VARCHAR`, `NVARCHAR` depending on the database provider.

```prisma
age Int
```
32-bit integer scalar type. Maps to `INTEGER`, `INT`, `INT4` depending on the database provider.

```prisma
amount BigInt
```
64-bit integer scalar type for large numbers. Maps to `BIGINT`, `INT8`.

```prisma
price Float
```
Floating-point number scalar type. Maps to `DOUBLE PRECISION`, `FLOAT`, `REAL`.

```prisma
amount Decimal
```
Exact decimal number scalar type for precision calculations (financial data). Maps to `DECIMAL`, `NUMERIC`.

```prisma
isActive Boolean
```
True/false boolean scalar type. Maps to `BOOLEAN`, `BIT`, `TINYINT(1)`.

```prisma
createdAt DateTime @default(now())
```
Date and time scalar type. Maps to `TIMESTAMP`, `DATETIME`, `TIMESTAMPTZ`.

```prisma
metadata Json
```
JSON data scalar type. Maps to `JSON`, `JSONB`. Not supported on SQLite.

```prisma
avatar Bytes
```
Binary data scalar type. Maps to `BYTEA`, `BLOB`, `VARBINARY`.

```prisma
id Int @id @default(autoincrement())
```
Marks a field as the primary key of the model. Each model must have exactly one `@id` or `@@id`.

```prisma
email String @unique
```
Adds a unique constraint to the field. The database will enforce uniqueness.

```prisma
author User @relation(fields: [authorId], references: [id])
```
Defines the relation between two models. `fields` specifies the foreign key column(s), `references` specifies the referenced column(s).

```prisma
firstName String @map("first_name")
```
Maps a Prisma field name to a different database column name.

```prisma
updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
```
Automatically updates the field to the current timestamp on every record update.

```prisma
legacyField String @ignore
```
Excludes a field from the Prisma Client API. Useful for unsupported column types during introspection.

```prisma
@@id([postId, tagId])
```
Defines a composite primary key. The combination of the specified fields must be unique.

```prisma
@@unique([firstName, lastName])
```
Defines a composite unique constraint. The combination of the specified fields must be unique.

```prisma
@@index([email, name])
@@index([title], type: BTree)
```
Defines a database index on one or more fields to improve query performance.

```prisma
@@map("users")
```
Maps the model name to a different database table name.

```prisma
@@ignore
```
Excludes the entire model from the Prisma Client API.

```prisma
@@fulltext([title, content])
```
Defines a full-text search index. Supported on MySQL and PostgreSQL.

```prisma
@@schema("auth")
```
Assigns the model to a specific database schema. Requires the `multiSchema` preview feature.

```prisma
id Int @id @default(autoincrement())
```
Generates an auto-incrementing integer value. Only valid on `Int` or `BigInt` fields.

```prisma
id String @id @default(uuid())
```
Generates a UUID v4 value. Only valid on `String` fields.

```prisma
id String @id @default(cuid())
```
Generates a CUID (collision-resistant unique identifier). Only valid on `String` fields.

```prisma
createdAt DateTime @default(now())
```
Sets the default to the current date and time when the record is created.

```prisma
id String @id @default(dbgenerated("gen_random_uuid()"))
```
Uses a database-level SQL expression for the default value.

```prisma
url = env("DATABASE_URL")
```
References an environment variable. Used in `datasource` and `generator` blocks.
